title: Upcoming Ids and MD Plans Improvements

body.text: This update adds a way for me to include upcoming identities and E.G.Os to the site. Users will be able to include them in their builds, but since they don't have any data attached, they won't have their own page or be included in any computations.

MD plans are also getting a number of improvements, most important of which is the Spec Build recommendation mode where users can set a build specifically for that MD plan instead of having to select existing published builds.

texts: Added a way for me to include upcoming identities and E.G.Os to the site. Added the new upcoming Ring identities.
MD Plans: Spec Build recommendation mode added. Use this to create a build specifically for the MD Plan instead of selecting a published one.
MD Plans: Added a Max Event Rolls panel for the Build and Spec Build recommendation modes, showing how well the team can roll in random event nodes.
Made minor updates to some tips in the Achievement Tracker
Changed how the update history is handled internally so it scales better when there are more updates in the future
Changed the delete buttons in all posts to consistently navigate the user back to the My Posts page after deletion
Removed 'My Published Builds/Md Plans tabs' when selecting them if the user isn't logged in
Fixed an issue when selecting multiple builds in MD Plans can sometimes not automatically move the build in the background to the latest selected one.
